name: Orange Whole Wheat Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and oil together in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, sift together the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Gradually add the dry mixture to the egg mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Slowly stir in the orange juice, adding more if needed to achieve a thin batter consistency.
5. Heat a medium-sized griddle or frying pan over low heat.
6. Using a ladle or measuring cup, pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes and the edges start to look dry, approximately 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Turn off the heat and serve the pancakes warm.
